text:
Clutch Blends Both Forza Horizon And Motorsport With A Dash Of Fast & Furious
NOTE: We misheard how co-op campaign works in our hands on; players will each take control of a sibling, not steering and acceleration.

Clutch is a narrative focused racing game from former developers from the Forza Horizon series, and seems to be all gas, no brakes

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
CLUTCH Is Forza Horizon + Motorsport + Fast & Furious
Tom got to see a ton of new gameplay for CLUTCH and finds that it seems like a comfortable blend of both Forza Motorsport and Forza Horizon with dashes of Need For Speed Hot Pursuit and a good amount of Fast and Furious influence. 

For more check out the full video on GameSpot's Youtube channel.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Peak Lara Croft Is So Back In Tomb Raider: Legacy Of Atlantis
Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis marks the return of acrobatics, dual-pistols, and the Lara Croft we all know and love. After spending 30 minutes swinging through Peru and fighting off dinosaurs, here's what Jessica Cogswell had to say about the latest entry in the 30-year-old series.

#tombraider #laracroft #gaming 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis MIXES The OG With The New
Jess got to play 20 minutes of Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis and found it to be the closest the series has felt to the originals in a long time. 

She also liked that it didnt feel like the game was holding her hand too much of the time and is excited to see how the games puzzle may ramp up in the actual game.

For more check out the full video on the GameSpot Youtube channel.

text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved - 9 Minutes Of 3rd Person Gameplay | The Silent Cartographer
A first look at 3rd Person gameplay from the Halo: Campaign Evolved mission, The Silent Cartographer, on a pre-release build. Enabled with the all-new “Perspective” Skull, this third-person camera angle allows players to experience iconic Halo missions like never before. 

Halo: Campaign Evolved is coming to Xbox Series X|S, PC, and PlayStation 5 on July 28. Pre-order the Premium Edition today and get up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Fable - 30 Minute Gameplay Demo | Build An Extraordinary Life
Step into Albion and find out what it means to build an extraordinary life.

This extended gameplay demo dives into the heart of Fable's living population - a systemic, interconnected game-within-a-game. Charm your way into friendships, raise a family, or chase wealth, power and prestige as you venture across Albion. Or why not all of the above?

In this video, you'll see:
. Living an Extraordinary Life: Build relationships, form a family, and carve out your place in Albion.
. Meaningful Choices: Your decisions don’t just impact the story - they change people’s lives, and you'll have to live with the consequences.
. A Nuanced Reputation System: every NPC has their own personality, and will react differently to you based on your actions.

In Fable, Albion evolves with you as you play, and the consequences of your decisions are never far behind.

Fable arrives February 23, 2027 on XBOX Series X|S, Game Pass, Steam and PlayStation 5. 

#Fable #FableTheGame #gaming #gameplay
